---
title: "Call for Papers"
---

We invite submissions for the **TAIH Symposium 2026**. We welcome contributions from researchers and practitioners across academia and industry.

## Important Dates

* **Submission deadline:** May 5, 11:59 MDT
* **Author notification:** May 17, 11:59 MDT
* **Camera-ready deadline:** May 22, 11:59 MDT

## Topics of Interest

We welcome a broad spectrum of research on transdisciplinary efforts in development and use of AI. Examples are:

* AI in healthcare and medicine
* AI in critical infrastructure and energy
* Human-AI interaction and collaboration
* Ethical, governance, and societal implications of AI
* Transdisciplinary case studies and real-world applications
* Trustworthy ML foundations (explainability, interpretability, fairness, robustness, etc.)

## Submission Guidelines
* Will be updated shortly.
* All submissions will be peer-reviewed in a double-blind process.
